commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6763870a428735a0e81f928d2992f7b5a55dc733)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds maintainer decision packet JSON generation, report frontmatter pointers, apply/replay/reconcile sync hooks, README documentation, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for a current-main bug; this is a feature PR. The remaining merge gate is source-reviewable and evidence-based: the branch adds packet writes in apply/replay/reconcile, but the PR does not show real output from those paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is still required, so this should stay in human review rather than ClawSweeper repair automation.

target.title: Add maintainer decision packets
target.body:
﻿## Summary

- writes maintainer decision packet JSON alongside ClawSweeper close/review records
- derives packet state from the current GitHub labels, review status, proof, and close report details
- updates packets during apply/replay/reconcile paths so skipped or drifted items keep the maintainer-facing data current

## Companion reports UI

Companion maintainers report UI branch is ready locally at `d081921d0a3f4baa3391bc0de3303955bc81c5fc` (`codex/decision-packets-reports-v1`). The PR link will be added once that branch can be published in `openclaw/maintainers`.

A local reports UI preview was generated from the maintainers branch. The available GitHub CLI/app path can comment but cannot upload PNG attachments, so the rendered screenshots are shared in the Codex thread rather than embedded as non-rendering local links.

## GHAS / CodeQL Follow-Up

- Replaced the initially flagged report-heading regex with explicit line parsing in `src/decision-packets.ts`.
- CodeQL passed on the amended commit.

## Validation

- `pnpm run build:all`
- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check README.md src/clawsweeper.ts src/decision-packets.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/decision-packets.ts` after the CodeQL follow-up
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "decision packet|maintainer decision packet|apply-decisions skips advisory label sync when a close report changed since review" test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `git diff --check` (CRLF warnings only)
- GitHub PR checks passed, including CodeQL and `pnpm check`

Full `test/clawsweeper.test.ts` was not rerun in this final pass because the broader Windows lane previously hit an existing CRLF-sensitive workflow regex failure unrelated to this patch.
target.author: brokemac79

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
